name: Savoir Gold EDP
description: SAVOIR GOLD Eau de Parfum, the second in the collection. Inspired by Baccarat Rouge 540 by Francis Kurkdjian. Bold and mysterious. A scent that leaves an unforgettable, lingering impression. Notes: a blend of oriental florals and warm spices — freshly cut cedar, vibrant saffron, and velvety vanilla.
ingredients: Fragrance composition. Full ingredients listed at point of purchase.
